completed_tasks.name: Fix progress bar 0% for storage-only setups

remaining_tasks.name: Remove [STM-DIAG] process: print from window_smart_thread_manager.gd after confirming progress bar works
Full 14-point in-game verification (7 conditions x 2 mods)

blockers.description: Progress bar fix not yet confirmed — user needs to relaunch and test after d691c5e. If still 0, read [STM-DIAG] process: lines from godot.log to see input.count and output.demand values.
blockers.workaround: Diagnostic print added to window_smart_thread_manager.gd process() — log will show exact values.

human_actions_pending.action: Relaunch Upload Labs. Test STM with upstream + 2 downstream Thread Manager windows. (1) Does mod appear? (2) Does progress bar show non-zero? Check C:/Users/Jake/AppData/Roaming/Upload Labs/logs/godot.log for [STM-DIAG] process: lines.
human_actions_pending.context: Latest ZIP has correct mods-unpacked/ prefix (d691c5e). distribution_modes.gd sets state.demand=value when no consumers, so output.demand>0. Window script has effective_demand fallback. Both should produce non-zero progress bar.

decisions.decision: ZIP packaging base must be MOD DIRECTORY (Smrt Thread Manager/), NOT mods-unpacked/ subdirectory
decisions.rationale: Mod loader requires entries prefixed with mods-unpacked/kuuk-SmartThreadManager/... Using mods-unpacked/ as base produces entries without that prefix, silently breaking mod loading

decisions.decision: state.demand = value when no consumers (storage-only case)
decisions.rationale: Thread Manager windows are STM_STORAGE with no demand. distribution_ratio was setting state.demand=0, making progress bar 0%. Fix: use incoming resource value as demand when total=0

decisions.decision: connection_out_set signal + tick fallback (preserve, never remove)
decisions.rationale: Core fix for update_connections() not firing. In both smart_resource_container.gd files.

next_action: Resume 14-point verification after user confirms: (1) mod loads, (2) progress bar non-zero. Remove [STM-DIAG] process: print from window_smart_thread_manager.gd once confirmed. Then run full verification.
context_notes: Three packaging bugs discovered this session: (1) Compress-Archive backslash paths [fixed Phase 1], (2) wrong base directory in .NET ZipArchive script produces missing mods-unpacked/ prefix [fixed d691c5e], (3) state.demand=0 for storage-only setups [fixed d691c5e]. Always use parent mod directory as base. The diagnostic print in process() is temporary — remove after progress bar confirmed working.
